property.name: mode
property.label: Render Mode
property.description: embedded (default — minimal chrome, in-app) or fullscreen (full toolbar, standalone app page)

property.name: fullscreenUrl
property.label: Fullscreen URL
property.description: Outbound URL for the NG fullscreen button (e.g. /apex/DeliveryGanttStandalone). Only set on the Standalone FlexiPage — leave empty on embedded + VF routes. Namespace prefix is applied automatically at runtime for subscriber orgs.

property.name: chromeHiddenDefault
property.label: Hide Chrome by Default
property.description: Inverted name (LWC1503): set true to hide NG's chrome (titlebar rows) on mount. Default false = chrome visible (good for Standalone). Set true on Embedded to surface a minimal-chrome view when SF chrome already surrounds the component. Honored by NG 0.183+.

LightningComponentBundle.description: Priority-grouped delivery timeline (NOW / NEXT / PLANNED / PROPOSED / HOLD) powered by nimbus-gantt's PriorityGroupingPlugin. Ports the cloudnimbusllc.com /mf/delivery-timeline-v5 page to a DH LWC that consumes real WorkItem__c records.
